author: y4rr
content: Result: fix landed in roi_align/aligned=false + keypoint ROI 4-level + LevelMapper eps. Harness: 7/8 PASS no regression; keypointrcnn 4/5 images PASS, image5 score_max_abs=0.0245 vs 0.02 threshold (0.0045 over). Pre-fix was 3 FAIL images and score_max_abs 0.0679 on image5 — fix already a 2.8× tightening. Residual: f32 noise on rank-4 sorted-score for a borderline 2-class person detection (rust 0.061 vs tv 0.096 — same physical box). Lib tests 446/446 PASS; clippy clean; build clean.
